auth.label: API Key
auth.description: EmailListVerify API key passed as the secret query parameter. Get or activate your API key from the API page: https://emaillistverify.com/api.

actions.name: check_disposable
actions.description: Check whether one email domain is disposable with EmailListVerify.

domain.description: The email domain to check for disposable-email status.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for checking whether one email domain is disposable.

domain.description: The email domain that was checked.

result.description: The disposability status returned for the email domain.

anyOf.description: The provider value, or null when unavailable.
The provider value, or null when unavailable.
The provider value, or null when unavailable.

outputSchema.description: The disposable-domain verification result returned by EmailListVerify.

actions.name: delete_email_list
actions.description: Delete one finished EmailListVerify email list.

emailListId.description: The identifier of the uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for referencing one uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

deleted.description: Whether the email list was deleted successfully.

emailListId.description: The identifier of the uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

outputSchema.description: The confirmation payload returned after deleting an EmailListVerify email list.

actions.name: download_email_list
actions.description: Download one finished EmailListVerify email list as base64 content.

emailListId.description: The identifier of the uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

format.description: The output file format to request.

items.description: The EmailListVerify deliverability status for the email address.

results.description: Only include rows whose verification result matches one of these statuses.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for downloading one finished EmailListVerify email list.

contentType.description: The response content type returned by EmailListVerify.

contentBase64.description: The downloaded file content encoded as base64.

outputSchema.description: The downloaded EmailListVerify email list encoded as base64 content.

actions.name: get_credits
actions.description: Retrieve the available EmailListVerify on-demand and subscription credits.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

available.description: Remaining subscription credits for the current period.

expiresAt.description: The ISO 8601 expiration timestamp of the current subscription period.

anyOf.description: Subscription credits for the current billing period.

actions.name: get_email_list_progress
actions.description: Get the current progress of one uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

emailListId.description: The identifier of the uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for referencing one uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

status.description: The current status of the uploaded email list.

progress.description: The percentage completion of the uploaded email list.

anyOf.description: The provider integer value, or null when unavailable.
The provider integer value, or null when unavailable.

credits.description: Credit usage information for the uploaded email list.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the email list was uploaded.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the email list was last updated.

outputSchema.description: The progress information for one uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

actions.name: upload_email_list
actions.description: Upload one email list file to EmailListVerify for batch verification.

fileName.description: The file name sent to EmailListVerify.

contentText.description: Plain text file content for csv or txt email lists.

contentBase64.description: Base64-encoded file content for csv, txt, or xlsx email lists.

quality.description: The verification quality requested for the uploaded email list.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for uploading one email list to EmailListVerify. Exactly one of contentText or contentBase64 must be provided.

emailListId.description: The identifier of the uploaded EmailListVerify email list.

outputSchema.description: The identifier returned after EmailListVerify accepts the uploaded email list.

actions.name: verify_email
actions.description: Verify a single email address with EmailListVerify's real-time API.

email.description: The email address to verify with EmailListVerify.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for verifying a single email address with EmailListVerify.

email.description: The email address that was verified.

status.description: The EmailListVerify deliverability status for the email address.

outputSchema.description: The plain text verification result normalized into a stable object.

actions.name: verify_email_detailed
actions.description: Verify and enrich a single email address with EmailListVerify's detailed API.

email.description: The email address to verify with EmailListVerify.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for verifying a single email address with EmailListVerify.

email.description: The email address that was verified.

result.description: The EmailListVerify deliverability status for the email address.

account.description: The local part of the email address before the at sign.

domain.description: The domain part of the email address.

isRole.description: Whether the email address belongs to a role account.

isFree.description: Whether the email address uses a free email provider.

isNoReply.description: Whether the email address is a no-reply inbox.

mxServer.description: The MX server associated with the email domain.

mxServerIp.description: The IP address of the MX server.

firstName.description: The first name inferred from the email address, when available.

lastName.description: The last name inferred from the email address, when available.

gender.description: The gender inferred from the email address, when available.

internalResult.description: The provider's internal processing result, when available.

outputSchema.description: The detailed EmailListVerify enrichment result for a single email address.
